Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests.datatype

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    baseFactoryDeeplyTransitive()
    Ensures that the base factory of a datatype contains all datatype used in the datatype definition and all datatypes used by the latter (double indirection).
    void
    baseFactoryDependent()
    Ensures that the base factory of a datatype contains all datatype used in the datatype definition.
    void
    baseFactoryNominal()
    Ensures that the base factory of a datatype can be the default factory if no extension is needed.
    void
    baseFactorySimpler()
    Ensures that the base factory of a datatype can be the default factory if no extension is needed, even if the datatype was built with a more complete factory.
    void
    baseFactoryTransitive()
    Ensures that the base factory of a datatype contains all datatype used in the datatype definition and all datatypes used by the latter.
    void
    originNotNull()
    Ensures that a non null origin given to a datatype builder is found null in the finalized datatype.
    void
    originNull()
    Ensures that a null origin given to a datatype builder is found null in the finalized datatype.
    void
    originWithSimilarDatatypeInCache()
    Ensures that the datatype cache distinguishes similar datatypes with a different origin.
    void

    • baseFactoryNominal

      public void baseFactoryNominal()
      Ensures that the base factory of a datatype can be the default factory if no extension is needed.

    • baseFactorySimpler

      public void baseFactorySimpler()
      Ensures that the base factory of a datatype can be the default factory if no extension is needed, even if the datatype was built with a more complete factory.

    • baseFactoryDependent

      public void baseFactoryDependent()
      Ensures that the base factory of a datatype contains all datatype used in the datatype definition.

    • baseFactoryTransitive

      public void baseFactoryTransitive()
      Ensures that the base factory of a datatype contains all datatype used in the datatype definition and all datatypes used by the latter.

    • baseFactoryDeeplyTransitive

      public void baseFactoryDeeplyTransitive()
      Ensures that the base factory of a datatype contains all datatype used in the datatype definition and all datatypes used by the latter (double indirection).

    • originNull

      public void originNull() throws Exception
      Ensures that a null origin given to a datatype builder is found null in the finalized datatype.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • originNotNull

      public void originNotNull() throws Exception
      Ensures that a non null origin given to a datatype builder is found null in the finalized datatype.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • originWithSimilarDatatypeInCache

      public void originWithSimilarDatatypeInCache() throws Exception
      Ensures that the datatype cache distinguishes similar datatypes with a different origin.
      Throws:
      Exception
